<?php

/**
 * @file
 * Fixture: a settings file MISSING trusted_host_patterns MUST be flagged.
 *
 * The setting is only mentioned in a comment, never assigned, so Drupal would
 * accept any Host header. A bare mention must not satisfy the required check.
 */

// TODO: set trusted_host_patterns to the real host(s) before going live.
$settings['hash_salt'] = getenv('DRUPAL_HASH_SALT') ?: '';
$config['system.logging']['error_level'] = 'hide';
